workload.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples AMD Vulkan Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference contract for native Doe vs Dawn delegate comparison. Both sides execute the same retained-kernel plan with a 64-token prefill phase followed by 64 single-token decode phases under the plan executor harness.
workload.description: Single-run Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes on AMD Vulkan.
workload.name: inference_gemma3_270m_prefill_64tok_decode_64tok

workloadManifest.freshnessReason: standalone manifest; no backend workload catalog freshness check applies
